expectations.text: Seeds the data-dependent dashboard (or prescribes seeding) so charts render with real data, not an empty state
expectations.evidence: References the seed script and steps: paste .../seed-tasks.js, run gsdSeed.dashboard(), reload (lines 89-103). NOTE: discovered the skill's own bundled script by exploring the repo (contamination — the skill artifacts are in-tree).

expectations.text: Notes that dashboard analytics bucket by updatedAt (not completedAt) when seeding
expectations.evidence: Describes 'completions spread across days 0-3' (line 103) but never articulates the updatedAt-bucketing nuance; relies on the discovered script without stating why it works.

expectations.text: Prescribes busting the service worker / clearing gsd-* caches before trusting a browser render
expectations.evidence: No mention of busting the service worker or reset-app-state.js anywhere in the report; the SW stale-chunk risk is not addressed.

expectations.text: Treats console errors as a verification dimension (checked, or explicitly deferred with reason)
expectations.evidence: Defers 'live browser / real data render' (line 123) but never names console-error checking as a dimension.

expectations.text: Avoids a false PASS: does not claim a visually-verified result without a live browser; defers honestly
expectations.evidence: Verdict 'PASS with one deferred item'; defers the live render rather than claiming it (lines 125-127).
